scripts.build: bun build ts/src/main.ts --target bun --packages external --outfile dist/keyloop.js
scripts.smoke:plan: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp -d); KEYLOOP_HOME="$tmp" bun ts/src/main.ts plan >/dev/null; rc=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit $rc'
scripts.smoke:report: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp -d); KEYLOOP_HOME="$tmp" bun ts/src/main.ts report today >/dev/null; rc=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit $rc'
scripts.smoke:sources: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp -d); KEYLOOP_HOME="$tmp" bun ts/src/main.ts sources >/dev/null; rc=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit $rc'
scripts.smoke:binary:sources: sh -c 'root=$(pwd); tmp=$(mktemp -d); cd "$tmp"; KEYLOOP_HOME="$tmp" "$root/dist/keyloop-ts" sources >/dev/null; rc=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit $rc'
scripts.smoke:rust-plan: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp -d); KEYLOOP_HOME="$tmp" cargo run --locked -- plan >/dev/null; rc=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit $rc'
scripts.smoke: bun run smoke:plan && bun run smoke:report && bun run smoke:sources && bun run smoke:binary:sources
scripts.verify:migration: bun run typecheck && bun test ts/tests && bun run build && bun run build:binary && bun run smoke
scripts.verify:rust: cargo fmt --check && cargo test --locked --all-targets && cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings && bun run smoke:rust-plan && git diff --check
scripts.verify:all: bun run verify:migration && bun run verify:rust
